scripts.db:migrate:identity: pnpm local:setup && docker compose run --rm identity-migration
scripts.db:reset:all: pnpm local:setup && docker compose down --volumes && pnpm services:start
scripts.db:reset:identity: pnpm local:setup && docker compose down && docker volume rm eventa_identity-database-data && pnpm services:start
scripts.services:start: pnpm local:setup && docker compose up --build -d && docker compose rm -f identity-migration
scripts.test:integration:gateway: pnpm local:setup && docker compose up -d api-gateway-redis && pnpm --filter @eventa/api-gateway test:integration
scripts.test:integration:identity: pnpm local:setup && docker compose up -d identity-database && pnpm --filter @eventa/identity-service test:integration
scripts.verify: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test:all && pnpm build && pnpm format:check
